hero.tagline: Zero API keys. Semantic hybrid ranking. Smart fallback. Harness platform. Your agent's training data is outdated. The web is not.

install.oneLiner: One-liner: installs package + auto-detects your AI agent + injects MCP config + enforces research-first rules.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.footer: Zero generative LLMs in the server. Synthesis is rule-based; your agent's LLM handles reasoning.
